scope: Tenant-local lifecycle, retrieval, archive, rehydration, redaction, and deletion behavior for operational-memory records.
principles: Preserve raw evidence so structured conclusions can be reprocessed and audited.
Do not place entire historical windows into a model prompt; retrieve only authorized relevant context.
Keep current structured state separate from append-only history.
A newer event may supersede an older fact without deleting the old record.
Legal, privacy, contractual, security, or project-owner deletion requirements override default retention through an audited tenant-local process.
AMCore never becomes the archive for production tenant data.

tiers.retrieval: Low-latency filtered retrieval by tenant, project, group, people, topic, source type, and time.
tiers.modelContextRule: Even hot data must be filtered and reranked; never send the entire hot window by default.

indexing: semantic index for supported non-sensitive content
tiers.retrieval: Retrieve on explicit project, task, decision, commitment, file, person, or evidence relevance.
tiers.modelContextRule: Return only top-ranked authorized excerpts and their provenance.

tiers.storage: tenant-local archive or lower-cost object storage
indexing: project, source, event, hash, and archive-locator index
tiers.retrieval: Use current project summaries, task history, decision logs, and verified knowledge first; rehydrate raw content only for historical or evidence requests.
tiers.modelContextRule: Cold raw content requires explicit authorized retrieval and must not be bulk-loaded.

Attachment.defaultRetention: follow parent SourceRecord unless tenant-local policy is stricter

TopicThread.mutability: versioned grouping with prior versions retained

ProjectGoal.defaultRetention: indefinite current projection plus version history

Project.defaultRetention: indefinite current projection plus periodic snapshots

Task.defaultRetention: indefinite current projection plus transition history

KnowledgeItem.defaultRetention: until tenant-local expiry, deprecation, or governed removal

embeddingPolicy.sensitiveContentDefault: disabled unless explicitly approved by tenant policy
embeddingPolicy.deleteOrRedactBehavior: Delete or rebuild all affected vectors and cached retrieval artifacts.

preconditions: metadata and authorization labels have been preserved
tierTransition.sourceRemovalAfterArchive: Only after archive verification and according to tenant-local storage policy.
tierTransition.failureBehavior: Keep the prior durable copy, record the failure, and retry without changing the tier marker.

deletionAndRedaction.projectionBehavior: Mark affected conclusions as source-withdrawn or pending review; never continue presenting unsupported facts as verified.

auditRequirements: record the actor, tenant, reason, timestamps, and affected resources
verify that no live tenant data is copied into AMCore
